rules.description: Temporary public BIM render preview endpoint
rules.business_reason: External coordinator needed temporary preview access for a BIM render review.
rules.recommended_access: private VPC/VPN only with authenticated preview link
rules.trigger: Temporary preview rule was created but left internet-facing during an active render job.
consequences: Sensitive BIM model and building layout may be reachable from the internet.
Attackers can probe or abuse the render endpoint, increasing compute cost.
Exposed high-energy render workload increases carbon and cost impact if left running.
recommended_actions: Remove 0.0.0.0/0 from the security group rule.
Move the render preview behind private VPC/VPN access.
Send an alert to the BIM rendering team to pause or secure the active render.
Add an expiry policy for temporary preview firewall rules.

rules.description: Private VPC traffic from jobsite telemetry network
Private VPC access for BIM model cache
